description: Defines the cloud-agnostic resource contract that all JustWorkflowIt infrastructure modules must satisfy. The CDK constructs package is the source of truth.

disambiguator.description: Unique identifier to differentiate multiple module instances in the same account/project

workflow_definitions.description: Array of JSON-stringified workflow definitions to deploy

ignore_deployer_failures.description: If true, module deployment won't fail if workflow registration errors

lambda_arns.description: AWS Lambda function ARNs to grant invoke permissions to

sns_topic_arns.description: AWS SNS topic ARNs to grant publish permissions to

sqs_queue_arns.description: AWS SQS queue ARNs to grant send message permissions to

cloud_function_urls.description: GCP Cloud Function URLs to grant invoke permissions to

pubsub_topic_ids.description: GCP Pub/Sub topic IDs to grant publish permissions to

execution_role_arn_or_id.description: ARN (AWS) or email (GCP) of the role/service account for JustWorkflowIt to assume

auth_secret.description: Secret storing the JustWorkflowIt API auth token

definition_storage.description: Object storage bucket for workflow definition JSON files

definition_deployer.description: Serverless function that registers workflows via the JustWorkflowIt API on deployment

execution_role.description: Cross-account/project role for JustWorkflowIt backend to assume when executing workflow steps
